record.text: Artikel gelesen ja, Interview gehört nein. Ai etabliert sich gerade in den größeren Firmen und Microsoft hat mit kostenpflichtigen Copilot Lizenzen durchaus ein Geschäftsmodell und Antrophics Claude ist jetzt schon für Developer unverzichtbar. Klar wird  eine Korrektur kommen, aber kein Crash

Ich hab den schon für null Anzahlung und 49€ im Monat Leasing gesehen. Aktuell für 57€.
Für den Preis lohnt kein Sharing
Spannend, aber Crash halte ich für übertrieben. Der Einsatz von Claude und Agenten ist zu gut, um da wieder mit aufzuhören

Hear me out: instead of shoving copilot into everything, Microsoft should make it so i can select a palette and then every new File Explorer window I open is a different colour. This is much higher priority and would actually save me a lot of time

If your response to discussions sparked by drivers hitting and killing pedestrians is to always show up and say "but also pedestrians need to do better," genuinely with all the kindness I can muster:

Fuck off.
“Daddy’s Home” and “Teeth” are my favourite parts so far, but it’s all so good.

Or do I jump ship, which could mean losing work life balance and back to square 1?? 
Final 6/6

But it’s come to my attention this week that several people are leaving. Roles are not being back filled and I feel like I’m on a sinking ship that’s going to ask more and more of me.  And now I find myself stressing again and wondering do I stick it out and hope this leads to opportunities,5/?

And my health has taken a real hit. So with this degree complete, and a schedule that frees up my afternoons. I decided that I was just going to spend the next year focusing on my health and just doing my job. No chasing dead ends. No going above and beyond just to be ignored and told no 4/?

record.text:
I've tried using an LLM to supplement the vanilla code completion and I did find it useful for multiple lines of code at once (particularly boilerplates), but I almost always make rewrites and I have to fight it when writing comments and if statements because it tries to be cleverer than it is.
3/3

So when I didn't have even basic code completion or syntax checking on a Codilitiy test, I had to keep tabbing out to the language's documentation to make sure I was doing things right. Older Reddit users were not kind in telling me I wasn't a "real programmer" because of that dependency 😅.
2/

I fell into this trap a few weeks ago. Every single class, course, and job I've had for the last 13 years told me to rely on those tools. The last time I did any coding unaided was in web design class in the mid-2000s.
1/
By Copilot
Boo him literally to death Knicks fans
@82-0.bsky.social  I understand the obvious utility of sharing our results to LinkedIn, but how about a button for Bluesky?

record.bridgyOriginalText:
For my sins, I have the Wetherspoon app installed on my phone. It's only for the airports which we consider international territory once we're through security. It's sometimes the only option when you're travelling early and want to start with a traditional beer and breakfast bap at 6 in the morning and don't want to talk to people. As you do.

Anyway, just had a notification inviting me to watch the World Cup in one of their pubs. I laughed. And shivered.

The horror.

Hard no from me.

ai 시대.. 회사내에서, ai로 찍어내는 앱.. 참 많네..

월드컵도, ai가 시청하고, 리뷰를 남겨야 하지 않을까? 예전엔, ai가 게임으로 월드컵 ai 플레이 정도나 만들었다면, 요즘은 영상화해서, ai화된, ai가 보기 위한 월드컵 영상도 나와야지?

사람이 월드컵 영상 볼 필요 있나. ai가 봐야지.

4. 사람이 ai에게 개발할 내용을 문서로 정리하라고, 시킨다. 생성된 문서를 검토를 ai에게 시킨다. 그리고, 사람은, 해당 문서를 힐끗 본다. 그리고, 다시 ai에게 문서 검토를 시킨다. 그리고, 사람은 또 다시 ai에게 문서 검토를 시킨다. 그리고, 사람이 힐끗 문서를 본다. 그리고, 사람은 또다시 ai에게 문서 검토를 시킨다. 그리고, 또 다시. 문서르르르 ㄹ. 그리고, 사람이 ai에게 갭ㄹ을 시킨다.  그리고. 사람이. 문서를 ai에게 시핔다. 그리고, 사람이, 개발이 되었나 본ㅌ다. 그리고 사람이 ai에게 마들어졋나 물.

総評

GeminiはGoogleDriveとの親和性高くドキュメント類の指示に出し反応よし。365Copilotでも可能だがソースが古いのでもうその内容じゃ出来ないよっのよく書いてくる

最近はClaude codeでコーティングしながら直接的なことはClaudeチャットで確認、技術的なことや最新情報の調査、最近の動向との照合にGrok使いながらというスタイルで使ってます
